title: A1 · Beginner
subtitle: Survival vocab — greetings, family, basic verbs, everyday objects.
focus: First survival vocabulary: people, home, food, time, very common verbs and adjectives, basic adverbs and a few high-frequency phrases.

groups.title: First survival words · 入门生存词
